title: YouTuber Ethan Klein caught screenshotting Anisa Jomha’s Instagram Story during live poker event as clip explodes online
summary_full: A viral Celebrity Poker Tour clip showed Ethan Klein seemingly screenshotting Anisa Jomha’s Instagram Story during a livestream. The moment quickly spread online because of Ethan Klein’s past public feud with Ian “iDubbbz” Carter and earlier comments involving Anisa Jomha.
